thought.text: 我将构建运行 Task2 评分作为基线。

action.command:
cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task2-score; printf '
--- score head ---
'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/score.txt 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,120p'; printf '
--- stderr tail ---
'; tail -80 /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/ctest.stderr 2>/dev/null; printf '
--- output files sample ---
'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2 -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name output.json -o -name answer.json -o -name score.txt \) | sed -n '1,80p'

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task2-score; printf '\\n--- score head ---\\n'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/score.txt 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,120p'; printf '\\n--- stderr tail ---\\n'; tail -80 /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2/ctest.stderr 2>/dev/null; printf '\\n--- output files sample ---\\n'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task2 -maxdepth 3 -type f \\( -name output.json -o -name answer.json -o -name score.txt \\) | sed -n '1,80p'", "timeout": 240, "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Run baseline task2 score"}
